sql_array: CREATE TABLE geo_points (id UInt32, lat Float64, lon Float64);
SELECT h3PointDistRads(lat, lon, 10.0, 0.0) AS distance FROM geo_points WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE geo_points SET lat = 20.0, lon = 10.0 WHERE id = 1;
SELECT h3PointDistRads(-10.0, 0.0, lat, lon) AS distance FROM geo_points WHERE id = 2;
